functions.name: UpgradeOperatorNodes
functions.description: Replace any old operator nodes (float + float, vector + float, int + vector, etc)

functions.name: SetBlueprintVariableInstanceEditable
functions.description: Sets "Instance Editable" to true/false on a Blueprint variable

functions.name: SetBlueprintVariableExposeToCinematics
functions.description: Sets "Expose To Cinematics" to true/false on a Blueprint variable

functions.name: SetBlueprintVariableExposeOnSpawn
functions.description: Sets "Expose On Spawn" to true/false on a Blueprint variable

functions.name: ReplaceVariableReferences
functions.description: Replace any references of variables with the OldVarName to references of those with the NewVarName if possible

functions.name: ReparentBlueprint
functions.description: Attempts to reparent the given blueprint to the new chosen parent class.

functions.name: RenameGraph
functions.description: Attempts to rename the given graph with a new name

functions.name: RemoveUnusedVariables
functions.description: Deletes any unused blueprint created variables the given blueprint.

functions.name: RemoveUnusedNodes
functions.description: Remove any nodes in this blueprint that have no connections made to them.

functions.name: RemoveGraph
functions.description: Removes the given graph from the blueprint if possible

functions.name: RemoveFunctionGraph
functions.description: Deletes the function of the given name on this blueprint. Does NOT replace function call sites.

functions.name: RefreshOpenEditorsForBlueprint
functions.description: Attempt to refresh any open blueprint editors for the given asset

functions.name: RefreshAllOpenBlueprintEditors
functions.description: Refresh any open blueprint editors

functions.name: GetStructType
functions.description: @return a pintype for the provided struct - returns 'int' type if invalid struct is provided

functions.name: GetSetType
functions.description: @return a set of ContainedType type - returns 'int' type if invalid type is provided

functions.name: GetSavedByEngineVersion
functions.description: Returns a string representation of the engine version which the given asset was saved with.

functions.name: GetObjectReferenceType
functions.description: @return a object reference pintype for the provided class - returns 'int' type if invalid object type is provided

functions.name: GetMapType
functions.description: @return a map of KeyType to ValueType type - returns 'int' type if invalid type is provided

functions.name: GetCurrentEngineVersion
functions.description: Returns a string which represents the current engine version (FEngineVersion::Current())

functions.name: GetClassReferenceType
functions.description: @return a class reference pintype for the provided class - returns 'int' type if invalid class is provided

functions.name: GetBlueprintForClass
functions.description: Looks up the UBlueprint that generated the provided class, if any. Provides a 'true' exec pin

functions.name: GetBlueprintAsset
functions.description: Casts the provided Object to a Blueprint - the root asset type of a blueprint asset. Note

functions.name: GetBasicTypeByName
functions.description: @return a pintype for 'int', 'byte', 'bool', 'real', 'name', 'string' or 'text' - returns 'int' type if invalid type is provided

functions.name: GetArrayType
functions.description: @return a array of ContainedType type - returns 'int' type if invalid type is provided

functions.name: GeneratedClass
functions.description: Gets the class generated when this blueprint is compiled

functions.name: FindGraph
functions.description: Finds the graph with the given name on the blueprint. Null if it doesn't have one.

functions.name: FindEventGraph
functions.description: Finds the event graph of the given blueprint. Null if it doesn't have one. This will only return

functions.name: CreateBlueprintAssetWithParent
functions.description: Creates a blueprint based on a specific parent, honoring registered custom blueprint types

functions.name: CompileBlueprint
functions.description: Compiles the given blueprint.

functions.name: CompareSoftObjectSaveVersionTo
functions.description: Compares the given soft object's save version to the VersionToCheck. This will read the packages file header

functions.name: CompareAssetSaveVersionTo
functions.description: Compares the given assets save version to the VersionToCheck.

functions.name: AddMemberVariableWithValue
functions.description: Adds a member variable to the specified blueprint inferring the type from a provided value.

functions.name: AddMemberVariable
functions.description: Adds a member variable to the specified blueprint with the specified type.

functions.name: AddFunctionGraph
functions.description: Adds a function to the given blueprint
